nasb.text: The Lord has rewarded me according to my righteousness; According to the cleanness of my hands He has recompensed me.

esv.text: “The Lord  dealt with me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands he rewarded me.

cnv.text: 耶和華按著我的公義報答我， 照著我手中的清潔回報我。

ccb.text: “耶和华因我公义而善待我， 因我清白而赏赐我。
